practice.name: Problem 9 (2010 AMC 12A)
practice.statement: The solution to the equation $\log_{10}(7n+110) = n$ is not an integer. Which of the following is the closest to $n$?

practice.name: Problem 3 (2015 AIME I)
practice.statement:
Let $x, y,$ and $z$ be real numbers that satisfy the system of equations 
$x+y+z=2$ 
$x^2+y^2+z^2=12$ 
$xyz=8$
Find $\frac{1}{xy+z-1} + \frac{1}{yz+x-1} + \frac{1}{zx+y-1}$.
